blockers.description: Auth gate (src/components/AuthGate.tsx) blocks access to ALL internal pages. The thirdweb client ID is set to 'placeholder', making real wallet connection impossible. Every route (/, /dashboard, /agents, /org-chart) displays the WalletAuthScreen sign-in page instead of the main app content. No sidebar, navigation, or page content is accessible.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Navigated directly to 4 different internal URLs (/, /dashboard, /agents, /org-chart) — all showed the auth gate sign-in screen. No non-disruptive workaround available.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 6 blocked. All assertions are blocked by the auth gate — the thirdweb client ID is 'placeholder' so wallet connection is not possible, and all pages show the WalletAuthScreen instead of app content.
